name: Octopus AIM VCT
summary: Octopus AIM VCT is a Venture Capital Trust (VCT) based in the United Kingdom that invests in smaller, unquoted companies listed on the Alternative Investment Market (AIM) of the London Stock Exchange. The VCT seeks to provide investors with attractive returns through a combination of dividend income and capital growth, while also offering tax benefits. The company is managed by Octopus Investments.
